entities.name: Exclusive Recruiter Contract
entities.context: A locked-in exclusive recruiting arrangement that is underperforming, preventing public job advertising

entities.name: Cost Discipline
entities.context: Emphasis on being cost-effective, leading to reliance on non-US talent and recruiters

entities.name: Non-US Talent
entities.context: Heavy reliance on non-US talent as part of cost-effectiveness strategy

entities.name: Execution-Focused Engineer
entities.context: Desired hire profile described as a 'soldier' to complement the founding engineer

entities.name: Founding Engineer
entities.context: Existing engineer on the team whom the new hire would complement

entities.name: Budget Band
entities.context: Up to ~$100k base or ~2% equity for the engineering role

entities.name: Back Channel Hiring
entities.context: Must operate via back channels due to exclusive recruiter contract constraints

entities.name: Culture Quality Fit
entities.context: Values both cost discipline and culture/quality fit in hiring

entities.name: Vendor Misalignment
entities.context: Past negative experiences with misaligned vendors or dev shop relationships

relationships.context: Cost-effectiveness emphasis led to heavy reliance on non-US talent
The exclusive contract forces hiring to happen through back channels rather than public postings
New hire intended to complement the founding engineer as an execution-focused counterpart
~$100k base or ~2% equity allocated for this engineering role
Past vendor failures motivate finding a direct, reliable engineer instead
Both valued simultaneously as hiring criteria despite tension between them
